SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2007 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEHOE, ROBERT E. KEHOE, LORENA R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUBARA, VICTOR KUBARA, IRMA $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR WAGES IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF KEHOE, ROBERT E. KEHOE, LORENA R.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY VICTOR KUBARA, IRMA KUBARA IS GRANTED. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. $2300.00 PAID BY DEFENDANT VICTOR KUBARA. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
